name: Downpour
descs:
Turn Start: Inflict (Current Turn Count x 2) [Vibration] Potency and +2 [Vibration] Count on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).

Turn End: Trigger [VibrationExplosion] on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).

Turn Start: inflict (3 + Current Turn Count x 2) [Vibration] Potency and +3 [Vibration] Count on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).

Turn End: trigger [VibrationExplosion] on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).

Turn Start: inflict (5 + Current Turn Count x 2) [Vibration] Potency and +3 [Vibration] Count on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).

Turn End: trigger  2 [VibrationExplosion] on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).
